titleStmt.title: Letter from Charles E.L. Olden to Turner & Ellis, 10 August 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Charles E.L. Olden

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: This is a letter from the extensive Bantry Estate Collection, held in the Boole Library of University College Cork. The collection, which covers a period of 300 years, contains the formal records regarding the legal, financial and general administration of this large house and estate in County Cork.

msIdentifier.repository: UCC Library Special Collections and Archives

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
BL/EP/B/446/p.342(2)
10th August 1916.
Estate of E. E. Leigh-White Esq.
Eccles Glengarriff Hotel Co. Ltd.
Chas E. L. Olden Esq. F.C.A.
Liqidator.
50 South Mall.
Cork.,
Dear Sir., I reply to your letter of the 7th inst,
below we give you particulars of rents due to above Estate.
Fo. 342 1/2 years rent out of Reenmeen West to 25th March 1916.
(last gale day) £8:3:1,
Railway unknown symbol Sanitary rate 2/—
I. Tax @ 3/—18/7 1:0:7.
345. do out of the Foreshore to
do. 1:10:0
344 8 9 months rent out of Monteendudder
to last Sept 1916. 1:0:0 1:2:6
345. 8 9 months do out of do
to do 6:18:4 7:10:0
£14:5:10
15:5:0
yours truly,
Turner & Ellis
Agents.
